stemHtml: Which option correctly lists ALL subparts of Annex V to EU Regulation No. 965/2012 (EASA AIR OPS PART-SPA)?

options.a: General requirements, PBN operations, MNPS operations, RVSM operations, LVO, ETOPS, Dangerous goods transport, Helicopter NVG operations, Helicopter hoist operations, Helicopter EMS operations, Helicopter offshore operations.
options.b: General requirements, MNPS operations, RVSM operations, LVO, ETOPS, Dangerous goods transport, Helicopter NVG operations, Helicopter hoist operations, Helicopter EMS operations, Helicopter offshore operations.
options.c: General requirements, PBN operations, MNPS operations, RVSM operations, LVO, ETOPS, Dangerous goods transport.
options.d: General requirements, PBN operations, MNPS operations, RVSM operations, ETOPS, Dangerous goods transport, Helicopter NVG operations, Helicopter hoist operations, Helicopter EMS operations, Flight time limitations.
